issues.title: Crime type labels are raw database values
issues.description: Labels like 'THEFT', 'BATTERY', 'ASSAULT' are in ALL CAPS and look like database values, not natural language. A citizen expects 'Theft', 'Battery', 'Assault'.

issues.title: No explanation of what crime types mean
issues.description: A citizen may not know the difference between 'THEFT' and 'BURGLARY' or what 'OFFENSE INVOLVING CHILDREN' covers.
issues.expected: Tooltip or glossary explaining each crime type
issues.actual: No explanations; only raw type names

summary: Crime Types page shows correct data but labels are raw database values without explanations.
